Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend The Complain
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend The Complaint to change the name of the Defendant.

Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company's unopposed motion to amend the complaint to change the name of a defendant is granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
